MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff ALL ENTHUSIAST INC. DBA DEALIGHTED.COM'S Motion To Compel Production Of Discovery Documents is
Off calendar per the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca L. Woodson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Discovery Documents
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Continued To Oct-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Friday, October 11, 2013:
Hal S. Shaftel, Esq. of Cadwalader, Wickersham & Taft LLP [212.504.6680] appearing by telephone for Plaintiff ALL ENTHUSIAST INC. DBA DEALIGHTED.COM;
D. Brad Jones, Esq. [408.295.4000] appearing by telephone for Defendant NEXTAG, INC.

The Court is informed the parties have reached a settlement in principle. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues Plaintiff ALL ENTHUSIAST INC. DBA DEALIGHTED.COM'S Motion To Compel Production Of Discovery Documents to October 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. The parties are directed to notify the court as soon as a settlement is finalized. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst A. Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
